author: doll-agent
content: Changed FittedGaussianMixture::bic / aic signatures from bic(n_samples: usize) to sklearn-faithful bic(x: andArray2<F>) -> Result<F> (and same for aic). Both now compute per-sample log-likelihood from X via score_samples then add the appropriate complexity penalty. Removed the old lower_bound * n shortcut (which assumed X was the training data) so the new signature also works on held-out data. Added the same two methods to FittedBayesianGaussianMixture using its own n_free_params() helper.
